payload.title: Inbox submit-observation flag mismatch caused failed command
payload.summary: A proposed sanctioned inbox submission command used --authority-principal, but the actual narada inbox submit-observation surface accepts --principal. The mismatch caused an avoidable failed command before the observation could be submitted.
evidence: Failed command used: narada inbox submit-observation ... --authority-principal builder
proposal: Devise a fix so authority principal naming is discoverable and hard to misuse, either by accepting --authority-principal as an alias or by aligning help/examples/errors across inbox submit surfaces.
payload.recommendation: Promote as task_candidate for inbox submit-observation CLI ergonomics

promotion.note: recorded_pending_crossing: executable promotion for target kind 'decision' is not implemented yet.
